intake.user_request: Remove the @deprecated analyzerService constructor parameter and private field from IndexingOrchestrator. The field was retained (with @deprecated JSDoc) during WO-RAG-INDEX-SINGLE-ANALYZER-SLICE-001 so that WO's diff radius stayed inside src/integration/rag/* and didn't have to touch src/cli/rag-index.ts. Now that the substrate WO is closed (a19249a, archive 2026-05-05), the cleanup is a clean low-priority follow-up.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Mechanical cleanup with known callsites. No investigation phase required — predecessor WO exhaustively documented the dependency surface. Three change targets identified at scoping time: (1) IndexingOrchestrator ctor + field, (2) src/cli/rag-index.ts construction site + AnalyzerService import, (3) indexing-pipeline.test.ts mock construction. Each is small and self-contained; can ship as 2-3 atomic commits.
classification.plan_type_decided_by: ORCHESTRATOR (DISPATCH-040 dispatch payload: 'Plan_type likely simple_implementation (no investigation phase needed — fix is mechanical)')
classification.discovery: Three callsites enumerated. AnalyzerService is still used by populate-coderef CLI; only the IndexingOrchestrator dependency on it goes away. The 'regression sentinel' comment in indexing-pipeline.test.ts (line 145) refers to an assertion that exists only in commentary — the mock is functionally dead weight and can be removed cleanly.

in_scope: src/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.ts: remove `private analyzerService: AnalyzerService` field (L360); remove `analyzerService: AnalyzerService,` ctor param (L366); remove `this.analyzerService = analyzerService;` assignment (L371); remove unused `import type { AnalyzerService }` (L14); update class JSDoc that references analyzer dependency

src/cli/rag-index.ts: remove `import { AnalyzerService } from '../analyzer/analyzer-service.js'` (L14); remove `const analyzerService = new AnalyzerService(args.projectDir);` (L437); remove `analyzerService,` argument from `new IndexingOrchestrator(...)` (L441)

src/integration/rag/__tests__/integration/indexing-pipeline.test.ts: remove `mockAnalyzerService` declaration + `vi.fn() analyze` mock (L147-149); remove `mockAnalyzerService,` argument from `new IndexingOrchestrator(...)` (L152); update or remove the 'regression sentinel' commentary at L140-146 since the field no longer exists
Verify no other production or test callsite constructs IndexingOrchestrator with analyzerService — predecessor-WO grep confirmed only these three sites

evidence_summary.predecessor_wo_evidence: WO-RAG-INDEX-SINGLE-ANALYZER-SLICE-001 ARCHIVED.md confirms the field is genuinely unused post-substrate-pivot (analyzerService.analyze is never called in production; mock is dead in test). The deprecation was a deliberate boundary-preserving choice, not an unfinished refactor.
